summary: Completed comprehensive testing of sports activity platform MVP. All backend APIs working correctly (13/13 tests passed), frontend loads properly with auth-gated functionality, and design matches sporty/energetic theme requirements.
passed_tests: All 13 backend API endpoints (sports, levels, activities CRUD, auth, dashboard, ratings)
Landing page loads with hero section, features grid, sports marquee, CTA section
Activities page loads with filters and empty state message
Auth-gated pages redirect properly when not authenticated
Dashboard, create activity, and profile pages accessible with authentication
UI theme matches requirements (Volt lime #CCFF00 + Carbon Black #0A0A0A)
Authentication flow changes UI appropriately (JOIN THE SQUAD -> BROWSE ACTIVITIES)
Navigation and user flows work correctly
